summary: Completed Stage 4 (User Profile + Wallet) testing for CrickPredict PWA. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend auth flow, navigation, and all pages working correctly.
passed_tests: Health endpoint GET /api/health returns status healthy
Security headers (X-Request-ID, X-Response-Time, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options) present
Auth: POST /api/auth/register creates user with 10000 signup bonus
Auth: POST /api/auth/register rejects duplicate phone (409)
Auth: POST /api/auth/register rejects invalid PIN
Auth: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns tokens + user
Auth: POST /api/auth/login rejects wrong PIN (401)
Auth: POST /api/auth/login rejects non-existent phone (401)
Auth: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user profile
Auth: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Auth: POST /api/auth/refresh with refresh token returns new tokens
User: GET /api/user/profile returns user data
User: PUT /api/user/profile updates username
User: GET /api/user/rank-progress returns rank and progress
User: GET /api/user/referral-stats returns referral code and count
User: GET /api/user/avatars returns preset avatar list
User: GET /api/user/leaderboard returns ranked users
Wallet: GET /api/wallet/balance returns balance and daily reward status
Wallet: GET /api/wallet/transactions returns paginated transaction history
Wallet: POST /api/wallet/claim-daily claims daily reward (or rejects if already claimed)
Wallet: POST /api/wallet/claim-daily fails if already claimed today
Frontend: Auth flow (welcome -> phone -> login -> PIN) works correctly
Frontend: Home page shows match cards, balance, bottom navigation
Frontend: Wallet page shows balance card, daily reward, transaction history
Frontend: Profile page shows user info, rank progress, referral code, logout
Frontend: Bottom navigation switches between Home/My Contest/Wallet/Profile tabs
Frontend: My Contests placeholder page loads correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user from test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 4 complete. All auth, user profile, and wallet APIs working. Frontend auth flow fixed from previous iteration. Test user has 10,500 coins (10,000 signup + 500 daily reward). Daily reward already claimed for today. My Contests page is a placeholder for Stage 7.
